chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1092 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No.10381 /2024 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.10382/2024 4. For hearing of main case 02.10.2024 Ms. Abida Parveen advocate along with applicant. -.-.-. 1&3. Granted. 2. Overruled. 4. Through instant application applicant seeks his protective bail in Crime No.24 of 2024 registered at PS FIA CC Hyderabad U/s 462-K, 409, 109, 34 PPC R/W 5 PCA 1947. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that applicant wants to surrender before the concerned court for his pre-arrest bail, however, he is in apprehension that he will be arrested. Be that as it may, without touching merits and de-merit of the case, the applicant/accused is granted protective bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25000/- and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court for 10 days from today. Till such time, NBWs issued against the applicant shall remain suspended. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 10 days from today or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
